name: Meltaway Maple Crisps
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
Cream butter until smooth.
Add sugar gradually and beat until fluffy.
Add maple flavoring and beat until well combined.
Stir in the sifted cake flour and mix thoroughly.
Gently fold in the chopped pecans.
Form the mixture into a ball.
Pinch off small pieces of dough and place on ungreased cookie sheets.
Flatten each piece with a glass dipped in sugar.
Bake for 7 minutes.
